enemy_categories.name: Criminal Elements
enemy_categories.category_rules: Increased bounty chance: roll 1D6 when setting up, 1-3 = that many bonus credits if you Hold the Field. Rival check: roll 2D6, 1 on either die = Rival. Both 1s = Rival AND +1 to their numbers in all battles.

enemies.name: Gangers
special_rules: Leg it: When hit by a shot, retreat 3" away from shooter

enemies.name: Punks
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative
Bad shots: Shooting only Hits on natural 6

enemies.name: Raiders
special_rules: Scavengers: Roll twice on Battlefield Finds Table

enemies.name: Cultists
special_rules: Intrigue: Roll 2D6 (+1 if killed Lieutenant/Unique). 9+ = Quest Rumor

enemies.name: Psychos
special_rules: Bad shots: Shooting only Hits on natural 6

enemies.name: Brat Gang
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Gene Renegades
special_rules: Alert: -1 to Seize the Initiative

enemies.name: Anarchists
special_rules: Stubborn: Ignore first casualty for Morale check

enemies.name: Pirates
special_rules: Loot: Extra Loot roll if Holding the Field

enemies.name: K'Erin Outlaws
special_rules: Stubborn: Ignore first casualty for Morale check

enemies.name: Skulker Brigands
special_rules: Alert: -1 to Seize the Initiative
Scavengers: Roll twice on Battlefield Finds Table

enemies.name: Tech Gangers
special_rules: Loot: Extra Loot roll if Holding the Field
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Starport Scum
special_rules: Friday Night Warriors: When slain, allies within 6" retreat base speed toward own edge

enemies.name: Hulker Gang
special_rules: Ferocious: +1 to Brawling when initiating
Aggro: If Hit by shot and surviving, move 1" toward shooter

enemies.name: Gun Slingers
special_rules: Trick shot: Natural 6 when shooting = extra shot at same/adjacent target within 2"

enemy_categories.name: Hired Muscle
enemy_categories.category_rules: Someone has hired goons to stop you. -1 to Seize the Initiative (cumulative with enemy modifiers).

enemies.name: Unknown Mercs
special_rules: Let's call it a day: If 1-2 figures remaining, accept ending fight. Neither side Holds the Field

enemies.name: Enforcers
special_rules: Cop killer: As Rivals, +2 to their numbers

enemies.name: Guild Troops
special_rules: Intrigue: Roll 2D6 (+1 if killed Lieutenant/Unique). 9+ = Quest Rumor

enemies.name: Roid-gangers
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative (net 0)

enemies.name: Black Ops Team
special_rules: Tough fight: Random survivor gains +1 XP

enemies.name: War Bots
special_rules: Fearless: Never affected by Morale
5+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Secret Agents
special_rules: Loot: Extra Loot roll if Holding the Field
Intrigue: Roll 2D6 (+1 if killed Lieutenant/Unique). 9+ = Quest Rumor

enemies.name: Assassins
special_rules: Gruesome: Post-battle Injury roll -5
Tough fight: Random survivor gains +1 XP

enemies.name: Feral Mercenaries
special_rules: Quick feet: +1" to Dash distance

enemies.name: Skulker Mercenaries
special_rules: Alert: -1 to Seize the Initiative (total -2)
Scavengers: Roll twice on Battlefield Finds Table

enemies.name: Corporate Security
special_rules: 6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Unity Grunts
special_rules: 6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Security Bots
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative (net 0)
Fearless: Never affected by Morale
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Black Dragon Mercs
special_rules: Stubborn: Ignore first casualty for Morale check

enemies.name: Rage Lizard Mercs
special_rules: Up close: Within 1" of terrain, +1 to Brawling

enemies.name: Blood Storm Mercs
special_rules: Ferocious: +1 to Brawling when initiating

enemy_categories.name: Interested Parties
enemy_categories.category_rules: +1 when rolling for Unique Individuals. During Quest missions, reroll any die scoring 1 once when rolling for number of opponents.

enemies.name: Renegade Soldiers
special_rules: Grudge: As Rivals, bring one additional figure

enemies.name: Bounty Hunters
special_rules: Intrigue: Roll 2D6 (+1 if killed Lieutenant/Unique). 9+ = Quest Rumor

enemies.name: Abandoned
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative
Cowardly: Lieutenants affected by Morale dice

enemies.name: Vigilantes
special_rules: Persistent: As Rivals, all removal rolls at -1

enemies.name: Isolationists
special_rules: Dogged: If 1-2 figures remaining, become Fearless

enemies.name: Zealots
special_rules: Ferocious: +1 to Brawling when initiating

enemies.name: Mutants
special_rules: Cowardly: Lieutenants affected by Morale dice

enemies.name: Primitives
special_rules: Going medieval: Each carries Blade. Specialists carry Brutal Melee Weapon

enemies.name: Precursor Exiles
special_rules: Prediction: Cannot Seize the Initiative

enemies.name: K'Erin Colonists
special_rules: Stubborn: Ignore first casualty for Morale check
Invasion Threat

enemies.name: Swift War Squad
special_rules: Unpredictable: Seize the Initiative always unmodified

enemies.name: Soulless Task Force
special_rules: 6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Tech Zealots
special_rules: Loot: Extra Loot roll if Holding the Field
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Colonial Militia
special_rules: Home field advantage: Count as in Cover on their third of table if not within 12" of shooter

enemies.name: Planetary Nomads
special_rules: Alert: -1 to Seize the Initiative

enemies.name: Salvage Team
special_rules: Scavengers: Roll twice on Battlefield Finds Table

enemy_categories.name: Roving Threats
enemy_categories.category_rules: Enemies never become Rivals. Never accompanied by Unique Individuals unless difficulty is Insanity.

enemies.name: Converted Acquisition
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative
Built-in: Always count as stationary when firing
Invasion Threat (test at +1)
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Converted Infiltrators
special_rules: Invasion Threat
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Abductor Raiders
special_rules: Invasion Threat

enemies.name: Swarm Brood
special_rules: Pack hunters: Brawls resolved at end of Enemy Actions phase. Always attempt to gang up
Invasion Threat

enemies.name: Haywire Robots
special_rules: Careless: +1 to Seize the Initiative
6+ Saving Throw

enemies.name: Razor Lizards
special_rules: Needle fangs: Armor Saving Throws ignored

enemies.name: Sand Runners
special_rules: Leap: If ending move within 3" of Human, leap into contact as Free Action

enemies.name: Void Rippers
special_rules: Gruesome: Post-battle Injury roll -5

enemies.name: Krorg
special_rules: Ferocious: +1 to Brawling when initiating
Easy targets: +1 when firing at this enemy
5+ Saving Throw
Tough fight: Random survivor gains +1 XP

enemies.name: Large Bugs
special_rules: Easy targets: +1 when firing at this enemy
Stubborn: Ignore first casualty for Morale check

enemies.name: Carnivore Chasers
special_rules: Alert: -1 to Seize the Initiative

enemies.name: Vent Crawlers
special_rules: Fate worse than death: If post-battle Injury = death, cannot be saved, no rerolls

enemies.name: Distorts
special_rules: Stubborn: Ignore first casualty for Morale check
Shimmer: Move through terrain and solid obstacles
When slain, roll 1D6. On 5-6, place another Distort 1D6" away

ai_weapon_rules.aggressive: Carry Blade in addition to listed weapons if Combat Skill is not +0
ai_weapon_rules.rampage: Always carry Blade in addition to other weapons

unique_individuals.name: Enemy Bruiser
special_rules: Uses base enemy stats with Toughness +1

unique_individuals.name: Enemy Heavy
special_rules: Uses base enemy stats

unique_individuals.name: Enemy Boss
special_rules: Uses same AI as main enemy
Reduces Bail Range by 1
When slain, extra Morale die rolled
Fearless

unique_individuals.name: Corporate Spook
special_rules: If all others slain/Bail, Spook Bails too
If slain, gain Corporate Rival

unique_individuals.name: Freelancer
special_rules: If slain in Brawl, roll on Loot Table and claim item immediately

unique_individuals.name: Secret Agent
special_rules: Target: Randomly select crew member. Agent prioritizes attacking them

unique_individuals.name: Hulker Brawler
special_rules: +1 Combat Skill when Brawling

unique_individuals.name: Gun Slinger
special_rules: +1 Combat Skill when shooting

unique_individuals.name: Mutant Bruiser
special_rules: Ferocious: +1 to Brawling when initiating

unique_individuals.name: Precursor Wanderer
special_rules: One with the Flow: Moves before Quick Actions phase
6+ Saving Throw

unique_individuals.name: Nomad Scout
special_rules: Concealed: Always counts as in Cover when fired upon

unique_individuals.name: Cyborg Merc
special_rules: 6+ Saving Throw

unique_individuals.name: Gene Dog
special_rules: Loyal: When owner/Dog enters Brawl, not resolved until both acted. If owner slain, Dog becomes Fearless. Bails when all others gone

unique_individuals.name: Mk II Security Bot
special_rules: Targeting AI: Fire twice per round at two closest visible targets
6+ Saving Throw

unique_individual_rules.general: All Unique Individuals are Fearless. Roll 2D6 (+1 if Interested Parties, +1 if Hardcore). 9+ = Unique Individual present. Insanity: Always present, 11-12 = 2 Unique Individuals.
unique_individual_rules.guardian_attachment: Guardian AI attaches to Lieutenant if present, otherwise random non-Specialist
unique_individual_rules.boss_ai: Enemy Boss uses the same AI type as the main enemy group
